entities.name: RAPESEED
entities.description: Brassica napus L., the subject of the study focusing on silique number variation

entities.name: SILIQUE NUMBER
entities.description: The most important component of yield in rapeseed, showing natural variation

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the crop, influenced by silique number

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method used to identify genetic loci associated with silique number

entities.name: LOCI
entities.description: Genetic regions identified via GWAS associated with silique number

entities.name: FLOWER NUMBER
entities.description: A component contributing to the difference in silique number

entities.name: SILIQUE SETTING RATE
entities.description: A component contributing to the difference in silique number

entities.name: TOTAL PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: A physiological process highly associated with silique number

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant, highly associated with silique number and candidate genes

entities.name: MICROSCOPIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Used to analyze the difference in flower bud amount

entities.name: FLOWER BUD
entities.description: The structure whose amount differs between more- and fewer-silique lines

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: Used to analyze the shoot apical meristem

entities.name: SHOOT APICAL MERISTEM
entities.description: The tissue analyzed via transcriptome analysis to identify enriched groups

entities.name: AUXIN BIOSYNTHESIS/METABOLISM
entities.description: Biological process associated with enriched groups in the shoot apical meristem

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: Biological process associated with enriched groups in the shoot apical meristem

entities.name: NUTRITION/ENERGY ACCUMULATION
entities.description: Biological process associated with enriched groups in the shoot apical meristem and silique number variation

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: Method used to identify candidate genes

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes identified by integrating GWAS and RNA-seq results

entities.name: SOURCE AND SINK
entities.description: The regulatory relationship reflecting biomass and nutrition accumulation
